title: Content Writing for Web Platforms
desc:
I am looking for a skilled writer who can step in and create clear, engaging copy across the usual online touch-points—think articles, product blurbs, or quick-hit social captions—depending on what each campaign calls for. The exact mix will vary, so I need someone comfortable shifting tone and length without losing brand voice.

Research and light SEO optimisation come with the territory: every piece should be fact-checked, keyword-aware, and ready to publish without heavy edits. If you have experience matching style guides, balancing informative value with an inviting tone, and turning feedback around quickly, you’ll fit in perfectly.

When you reply, please share a brief note on the kinds of content you excel at, one link or attachment that showcases your writing in a similar context, and your typical turnaround time for short and longer pieces.

title: Develop 9-EMA VWAP Bot
desc:
I need a clean, production-ready Python solution that trades automatically using a simple 9-period EMA + VWAP strategy. The script must:

• Stream live market data, calculate the indicators in real time, and act instantly on the signals it generates.  
• Place, modify, and cancel orders through my broker’s REST API without manual intervention.  
• Run reliably inside an AWS environment (EC2 or Lambda). Environment variables should hold all keys and secrets, and logging must write to CloudWatch for easy monitoring.  

Please structure the code for easy maintenance: clear functions, comments, and a requirements.txt file. Once finished, provide deployment instructions I can copy-paste into a fresh AWS instance and a quick test that confirms the bot is receiving data and submitting orders.  

Speed, stability, and readable code are the key acceptance criteria.

title: Permaculture Farm Landscape Design - 18/07/2026 08:14 EDT
desc:
I’m ready to turn my land into a fully productive permaculture system that prioritises food production. The layout must seamlessly integrate vegetables, fruits, and herbs, with an eye on year-round harvests and soil health. 

Key structural features I want included are greenhouses for season extension and climate control, plus a series of raised beds to boost soil quality and simplify crop rotation. Water-wise strategies are welcome; although I haven’t committed to a specific irrigation setup yet, the design should leave room to add one later without major rework.

Here’s what I need back from you:

• A scaled site plan showing zones, pathways, greenhouse and raised-bed placement.  
• A companion-planting and succession schedule covering vegetables, fruits, and herbs.  
• Construction guidelines for the greenhouses and raised beds, using readily sourced materials.  
• Soil-building and integrated pest-management recommendations suited to a diverse food-crop system.  

Please base the design on practical permaculture principles—stacking functions, edge maximisation, nutrient cycling—so the farm remains low-input once established. Digital formats (PDF plus editable source files from tools such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, or equivalent) will make revisions easy.

If that scope lines up with your expertise, I’m ready to share site measurements, photos, and climate data so you can get started right away.

title: STM32 I2C Driver Development
desc:
I need a clean, well-documented I2C driver written in C for my STM32 board. The driver must operate in both master and slave modes while staying strictly within the 100 kHz Standard-mode specification. Full read and write transactions are required in each role, including proper start/stop sequencing, ACK/NACK handling, and error recovery for bus faults or time-outs.

My current firmware is built with STM32CubeIDE, so the new module should compile there without warnings and slot neatly into the existing HAL-based project structure (pure LL implementations are also acceptable if you explain the integration steps).  

Deliverables  
• Source and header files with clear, line-level comments  
• An initialization routine that lets me choose master or slave at runtime  
• Blocking and non-blocking (interrupt or DMA) transfer functions for reads and writes  
• A concise example project that exercises master-to-slave and slave-to-master loops at 100 kHz, showing data integrity in both directions  
• A short README describing API usage, required clock settings, and any board-level wiring considerations

Acceptance criteria: the demo project must build in CubeIDE, run on my hardware, and pass a logic-analyzer capture showing correct waveforms for 10 consecutive read-then-write transactions in both roles.

If you have questions about the board revision or pinout, let me know early so we can keep the turnaround tight.

title: Facebook Sales Ads Targeting US
desc:
I run a growing clothing brand and am ready to scale into the United States with a purchase-focused Facebook campaign aimed at a clearly defined cultural community. I am not looking for traffic or engagement vanity metrics; the only success metric here is profitable website purchases and an improving ROAS.

Here’s what I need from you:

• Strategy & structure – map out the best campaign architecture inside Meta Ads Manager, advise on the daily budget required to hit break-even quickly, and explain why the structure will resonate with my chosen cultural group.  
• Technical build – install or verify the Meta Pixel, configure all purchase conversion events, create custom audiences, and set up look-alikes where it makes sense.  
• Creative & audience research – translate my product angles into scroll-stopping ad copy and visuals, backed by data on that community’s interests, pain points, and buying triggers.  
• Launch & optimisation – push the campaign live, monitor the learning phase, and iterate bids, placements, and creatives until we are tracking profitable sales.  
• Reporting – deliver a concise dashboard or weekly summary so I can see spend, CPA, ROAS, and next steps at a glance.

To be a good fit you’ll already have:

• Proven eCommerce Facebook Ads results for US audiences (case studies or screenshots welcome).  
• A strong grasp of conversion campaigns, event tracking, and budget pacing.  
• The confidence to justify your decisions with data, not guesswork.

This is a

title: Viết báo đề tài Giáo dục
desc:
Tôi cần một bài báo hoàn chỉnh về lĩnh vực Giáo dục. Bài viết phải:

• Tuân theo cấu trúc chuẩn của một bài báo, rõ ràng, súc tích và có dẫn chứng đáng tin cậy.  
• Thể hiện quan điểm hoặc góc nhìn mới, có chiều sâu phân tích.  
• Bao gồm mục “Ca ca vc” đúng như yêu cầu đã chọn.  
• Độ dài khoảng 1.000–1.500 từ, nội dung hoàn toàn nguyên bản và chưa từng đăng tải.  
• Trình bày trên file Word kèm bản PDF, dễ dàng trích dẫn hoặc chỉnh sửa.

Tôi đánh giá cao khả năng diễn đạt mạch lạc, nắm bắt xu hướng giáo dục hiện nay và tuân thủ deadline. Nếu bạn đã từng viết bài báo về giáo dục hay các chủ đề học thuật, hãy gửi kèm mẫu để tôi tham khảo.

title: Daikin AC Duct Design & Diffuser Selection
desc:
Project Title: HVAC Duct Design for Daikin Concealed AC with Linear Profile Diffuser

I am looking for an experienced HVAC design engineer to design the complete supply and return air ducting for my room.

AC Unit Details

* Brand: Daikin
* Model: FDBF24CRV16
* Type: Concealed ducted air conditioner
* Airflow: Approximately 800 CFM
* External Static Pressure (ESP): 20 mmWC

Room Details

* Room Size 1: 20 ft × 20 ft
* Room Size 2: 16 ft x 12 ft
* Ceiling Height: 9 ft

(NOTE: 2 UNITS WILL BE INSTALLED IN ROOM 1 and 1 UNIT WILL BE INSTALLED IN ROOM 2)

( BOTH THE UNITS IN ROOM 1 WILL BE ADJACENT TO EACH OTHER) 

Important Design Requirements

* I do not want long duct runs. The design should be as compact as possible.
* The plenum box or supply duct may be connected directly to the indoor unit with minimal ducting.
* The linear profile diffuser will be mounted vertically directly below/in front of the indoor unit, so the design should suit this installation arrangement.
* The objective is to achieve efficient air distribution while keeping the ductwork as short and simple as possible.

Scope of Work

1. Design the complete supply air duct/plenum from the indoor unit to the linear profile diffuser.
2. I will provide the manufacturer’s PDF catalogue of the linear profile diffuser. The diffuser must be selected only from this catalogue, with proper engineering justification.
3. Recommend the best diffuser model from the catalogue for my application.
4. The diffuser should provide

title: Realistic Documentary Character Creation
desc:
I have a finished narration-heavy script for a cinematic documentary and now need the on-screen human presence to match its tone. Your task is to build production-ready, realistic human characters—fully rigged, textured, and capable of nuanced performance—so I can drop them straight into the edit.

Scope  
• Design and model lifelike human figures that fit the documentary’s setting and era.  
• Rig faces and bodies for subtle performance capture.  
• Enable three key emotional ranges: happy & excited, sad & emotional, and serious & determined. Close-ups must read authentically.  
• Supply clean animation or ready-to-animate control rigs; I’m comfortable driving additional motion later through Unreal Engine or Blender, so compatibility with those pipelines is essential.  
• Deliver final files in .FBX or .USD along with any texture maps, look-dev notes, and a short rendered turntable or demo clip showing each emotion.

Acceptance  
A character passes when:  
1. Mesh is production-clean (no non-manifold geometry, subdivision-safe).  
2. Facial rig yields believable micro-expressions without mesh tearing.  
3. Supplied demo clip clearly shows the three requested emotional states.

I’ll provide the script, reference images, and any voice tracks you need as soon as we start. Let’s give these words a convincing human face.
